import React from 'react'; const About = () => { const values = [ { name: 'Compassion', description: 'We approach every interaction with empathy and understanding, creating a safe space for healing.' }, { name: 'Accessibility', description: 'We believe mental health support should be available to everyone, regardless of their circumstances.' }, { name: 'Innovation', description: 'We continuously evolve our tools and approaches based on the latest research and user feedback.' }, { name: 'Community', description: 'We foster connection and support among our users, reducing the isolation that often accompanies mental health challenges.' } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

About MindfulSpace

We're on a mission to make mental health support accessible, affordable, and effective for everyone.

{/* Story Section */}

Our Story

MindfulSpace is a digital platform designed to provide accessible mental health resources for everyone seeking support on their wellness journey.

We recognized that while many people struggle with mental health challenges, traditional support systems often have barriers like cost, availability, and stigma that prevent people from getting help.

Our platform combines evidence-based therapeutic approaches with modern technology to create tools that support mental wellness at scale.

{/* Values Section */}

Our Values

{values.map((value, index) => (
{index + 1}

{value.name}

{value.description}

))}
{/* Mission Section */}

Our Mission

At MindfulSpace, we believe everyone deserves access to quality mental health support. Our platform provides tools and resources to help you on your journey toward better mental wellness.

Whether you're seeking daily support, mood tracking, journaling tools, or community connection, we're here to support you every step of the way.

); }; export default About;
